assessment.note: She gives a clear self-read with a specific split between strong technical output and uneven influence, showing mild self-awareness and ownership.

new_queue.label: Uneven influence
new_queue.name: You said 'influence is uneven' — where has that shown up most clearly?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific pattern she named so the conversation stays anchored in observable evidence.

new_queue.label: Impact in practice
new_queue.name: What changed because of your work that would not have happened otherwise?
new_queue.description: Forces a concrete account of leverage and outcome rather than a delivery recap.

new_queue.label: Signal to stakeholders
new_queue.name: How did you make your work visible to the people who needed to see it?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the mechanisms she uses to raise signal beyond the immediate team.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Visibility gap
new_queue.name: What part of your contribution is easiest for others to miss?
new_queue.description: Tests whether she can identify where her work is under-sold or under-observed.

new_queue.label: Leverage choices
new_queue.name: Where do you choose to go deep instead of pulling others in earlier?
new_queue.description: Probes the judgment call between execution depth and earlier alignment.

new_queue.label: Next-step commitment
new_queue.name: What is one change you will make in the next two weeks to raise your visibility?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete behavioural commitment with a near-term date.
